mission.product: MKLink/MicroLink 专用嵌入式上位机，覆盖在线/脱机烧录、RTT、SystemView、VOFA、SuperWatch、内存、符号、串口、Modbus、CLI、MCP 和 AI skill。
mission.flash: 离线优先：标准安装包内置精简算法目录；用户可导入本地 Pack 或添加目标专用 FLM；联网安装 Pack 是可选补充。
mission.streaming: 高频数据使用二进制 WebSocket、Worker 固定容量缓冲和像素包络，前端绘制限制在 30 FPS。

current_session.current_task: 在第二台无开发环境和预置 Pack 缓存的 Windows 10/11 机器验证 b599f5c 标准 NSIS，并收集外部用户对器件目录与结构化符号的反馈。
latest_source_commits: e269e11 fix: refresh symbols and refine online flash controls
c9f4480 fix: report only runtime-readable symbols
b599f5c feat: expand runtime-readable structured symbols
current_session.model_inventory: release/20260720-152538/builtin-models.csv contains 10747 effective models across 65 manufacturer labels; BUILTIN-MODELS-SUMMARY.md is the compact summary.
current_session.flash_state: Online SWD supports up to 10 MHz. The GUI defaults to keep-running connection, uses one total progress bar, refreshes after Pack installation, fills the target search after selection, and supports builtin algorithms, local Pack import, custom FLM, and optional online Pack installation.
current_session.hpm_state: HPM targets use the dedicated ROM API path, require no FLM, expose no independent erase, and were not physically programmed in this session.
current_session.symbol_state: Only fixed-address runtime-readable scalar leaves are published. Fixed structures, arrays, and arrays of structures expand into member/index paths. Adjacent leaves remain eligible for merged reads. Each root is capped at 256 leaves with an explicit truncation notice.
current_session.stop_rule: Continue autonomously through implementation, proportional verification, standard NSIS packaging when needed, AI memory, commit, and push. Do not build MSI or WebView2-offline packages unless explicitly requested.

milestones.name: Online and offline flash workflows
milestones.notes: Online and offline paths share the unified target/algorithm catalog, preserve ordered firmware ranges, avoid implicit whole-chip erase, support 10 MHz, and cover builtin, local Pack, custom FLM, and optional online Pack sources.

milestones.name: Desktop dashboards and high-rate streaming
milestones.notes: RTT View, SystemView, VOFA, and SuperWatch use bounded binary streaming, Worker-owned buffers, explicit loss telemetry, pause/resume, and cleanup-safe resource ownership.

milestones.name: Runtime-readable structured symbols
milestones.notes: Configuration, Symbols, search/typeinfo, and SuperWatch share one generation- and fingerprint-aware catalog. Reparse and reconnect rebind valid selected channels and remove invalid ones.

milestones.name: Windows standard NSIS candidate
milestones.notes: The installed b599f5c candidate runs with the bundled sidecar under restricted PATH, spawns no Python child, exposes the expected build identity, and releases processes and ports on normal close.

verification.result: Python 860 passed and 1 skipped; GUI 32 files / 365 tests passed; Vite production build transformed 1908 modules; Rust 6 passed; cargo check completed.

Health ok; build identity b599f5c; no startup serial-read failure; 10 MHz visible; keep-running default; one total progress bar; target selection fills the search; SuperWatch follows RTT View; HPM5300 exposes zero algorithms.

BOOT exposes 59 runtime-readable leaves. RGB_LCD exposes 801 leaves, shown consistently in Configuration, Symbols, and SuperWatch. Adjacent structure-array leaves merged into one four-byte block and sampled in dump-memory mode with zero read drops, read errors, or binary batch drops.

STM32H7B0 internal and external Flash program/verify/reset paths passed in earlier qualification. The final symbol pass performed no erase or program. Normal close left zero product/Python processes and released ports 8765 and 9223.

decisions: Generate only the standard NSIS installer by default. MSI and WebView2-offline packages require explicit user request.
Only MKLink-exposed CMSIS-DAP probes are supported by the online flash UI.
BIN requires an explicit base address; HEX uses embedded addresses.
Ordinary programming erases only image-covered sectors and verifies readback before reset. Whole-chip erase remains a separate confirmed operation.
Algorithm selection is offline-first: builtin catalog, then user Pack, then target-scoped custom FLM; optional online Pack installation remains available.
HPM targets always use the HPM ROM API path and never discover or load FLM.
The public symbol catalog contains only fixed readable scalar leaves. Pointers, bit-fields, variable-length arrays, overlapping union aliases, incomplete layouts, and non-RAM addresses are excluded.
SuperWatch merges nearby addresses through build_read_blocks(max_gap=256) and preserves selected symbol names across valid reparse/reconnect transitions.
High-rate acquisition never waits for the browser; queues are bounded and report drops explicitly.
Do not commit installers, firmware, Pack files, standalone FLM, logs, screenshots, full probe IDs, COM ports, usernames, credentials, or local hardware paths.

hardware.probe: MKLink V4 available; identifier intentionally omitted

known_limits: The b599f5c standard NSIS has not yet been tested on a second clean Windows machine or VM.
The installer is unsigned and may show an unknown-publisher warning.
Optional online Pack installation requires outbound HTTPS and may require a configured proxy.
Physical HPM programming, V2/V3 offline deployment, target power loss, probe unplug, SWD disconnect, Serial, Modbus, and hidden-tab HIL are not established in the latest pass.
DISP0_ADAPTER and s_tLCDTextControl are intentionally truncated to their first 256 readable leaves.
One HK32 catalog region lacks reliable sector geometry and is correctly rejected for ordinary covered-sector programming.
next_actions: Install and qualify the b599f5c standard NSIS on a second clean Windows 10/11 machine without Python, Node, Rust, Keil, or pre-existing Pack cache.
Collect exact model and address-range reports from external users to correct any catalog naming or Flash geometry mismatch.
Collect exact variable paths for any missing fixed structure/array leaves and compare the Configuration, Symbols, and SuperWatch counts.
Add Windows code signing before promotion beyond prerelease.
continuation_protocol: Read docs/ai/CURRENT_HANDOFF.md and reconcile it with git status --short --branch and git log -12 --oneline.
Resume current_session.current_task before starting later work.
Before ending, update project-memory.json, render and validate the handoff, run proportional tests and git diff --check, then commit and push.
